aboutPage.title: About Eventra
aboutPage.subtitle: Your reference platform to discover and participate in the best events near you. We connect passionate organizers with enthusiastic participants to create unforgettable experiences.
aboutPage.whyChooseUsDesc: We are committed to providing the best possible experience for organizers and participants.
aboutPage.missionDesc: To make every event accessible, memorable and meaningful. We believe in the power of human connections and the ability of events to transform lives, create bonds and inspire change.
aboutPage.readyToJoinDesc: Whether you are an organizer or a participant, Eventra is the platform you need.

variedEvents.title: Varied Events
variedEvents.description: Discover a wide range of events suitable for all tastes and interests.

activeCommunity.title: Active Community
activeCommunity.description: Join a passionate community and connect with other participants.

preciseLocation.title: Precise Location
preciseLocation.description: Easily find events near you with our geolocation system.

qualityGuaranteed.title: Quality Guaranteed
qualityGuaranteed.description: All our events are verified to guarantee an exceptional experience.

customerService.title: Customer Service
customerService.description: Our team is available to support you and answer all your questions.

multilingual.title: Multilingual
multilingual.description: Enjoy our platform in French, English and Russian.

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.subtitle: We're here to help and answer any questions you might have. We look forward to hearing from you.
